briefdescription.para: Storage container for the characters.
Mutable forward iterator.
Immutable forward iterator.
Mutable reverse iterator.
Immutable reverse iterator.
Unsigned size type.
Signed distance type.
Stored value type.
Mutable element reference.
Immutable element reference.
Mutable element pointer.
Immutable element pointer.
Create an empty terminal string.
Create a terminal string from UTF-8 text.

parameterdescription.para: The UTF-8 text to split into terminal characters.
The color to use for the characters. Control codes are ignored except for tab and newline.
If the text is not valid UTF-8 or contains an unsupported character sequence.

briefdescription.para: Create a terminal string from UTF-32 text.

parameterdescription.para: The UTF-32 text to split into terminal characters.
The color to use for the characters. Control codes are ignored except for tab and newline.
If the text contains an unsupported character sequence.

briefdescription.para: Copy construct a terminal string.
Move construct a terminal string.
Copy-assign a terminal string.
Move-assign a terminal string.
Access one character without bounds checking.

simplesect.para: A copy of the character at index.

briefdescription.para: Access one character without bounds checking.

simplesect.para: A mutable reference to the character at index.

briefdescription.para: Append one character to this string.
Append another terminal string to this string.
Create a new string with one appended character.
Create a new string with another appended string.
Get the number of stored characters.
Get the width of the string in terminal cells.

simplesect.para: The sum of all character display widths.

briefdescription.para: Access one character with bounds checking.

simplesect.para: A copy of the character at index.

briefdescription.para: Test if this string is empty.
Get an iterator to the first character.
Get an iterator past the last character.
Get a const iterator to the first character.
Get a const iterator past the last character.
Get a const iterator to the first character.
Get a const iterator past the last character.
Get a reverse iterator to the last character.
Get a reverse iterator past the first character.
Get a const reverse iterator to the last character.
Get a const reverse iterator past the first character.
Get a const reverse iterator to the last character.
Get a const reverse iterator past the first character.
Reserve storage for at least the given number of characters.
Remove all characters from this string.
Append elements to this string.

detaileddescription.para:
This works similar to Terminal::print(). If you add a color, this color is "active" for all following characters in the same call. Just adding a color does not change the string.
args
The arguments to append.

briefdescription.para: Split the string into words at space, tab, carriage return, or newline characters.
Wrap this string into lines that have a maximum display width.

detaileddescription.para:
Paragraph breaks from newline characters are preserved as blank lines between paragraphs.
width
The maximum terminal width in cells. Must be greater than zero.
A sequence of lines.

briefdescription.para: A terminal string represented as a sequence of Char values.
